title: chatimage
description: Allows users to send image in chat bar.
body:
# usage
Send CI{"information":"<the information of image>","url":"<URL>","w":<width>,"h":<height>} in chat bar to send a image.  
Or use the [+] button on the chat screen to open the GUI.  
You can upload image witch is in you PC in the GUI.
# versions
mod verison 1.x is for minecraft 1.12.x with Forge.  
mod verison 2.x is for minecraft 1.21.x with Neoforge.
# Supported image formats
Depends on ImageIO of Java.
